title: stachys goulimyi
intro: Stachys goulimyi, also known as the Greek betony or goulimyi, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting digestive health. Stachys goulimyi can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
